# cloudfly_backup_schedule (Resource)

Manages a CloudFly instance backup schedule. The API auto-generates the schedule name; the `name` attribute is read-only.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudfly_backup_schedule" "example" {
  instance_id = cloudfly_instance.example.id
}

resource "cloudfly_backup_schedule" "daily" {
  instance_id = cloudfly_instance.example.id
  backup_type = "daily"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String)

### Optional

- `backup_type` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `rotation` (Number)
- `run_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import cloudfly_backup_schedule.example "<instance-id>/<backup-schedule-id>"
```
